syllogism: Every single elephant is capable of flight. There are no hippos that cannot fly. Any creature that is a dog can fly. Anything which is an animal is capable of flight. Every single insect is an animal. There are no insects that cannot fly.
syllogism_t: Ogni singolo elefante è capace di volare. Non esistono ippopotami che non sappiano volare. Qualsiasi creatura che sia un cane può volare. Tutto ciò che è un animale è capace di volare. Ogni singolo insetto è un animale. Non esistono insetti che non sappiano volare.

syllogism: No animal is warm-blooded. Every cat has feathers instead of fur. It is a fact that milk is poisonous to cats. A few of the things that are animals are mammals. Among the things that are cats, a few are animals. It follows that some cats are not mammals.
syllogism_t: Nessun animale è a sangue caldo. Ogni gatto ha piume invece di pelliccia. È un dato di fatto che il latte è velenoso per i gatti. Alcune delle cose che sono animali sono mammiferi. Tra le cose che sono gatti, alcune sono animali. Ne consegue che alcuni gatti non sono mammiferi.

syllogism: Anything that is a bird lays eggs. Every single duck is a bird. Some birds are creatures that build nests. Any ostrich is a bird that lays eggs. There are no penguins that do not lay eggs. There are no chickens that are not birds. It is the case that some chickens lay eggs.
syllogism_t: Tutto ciò che è un uccello depone le uova. Ogni singola anatra è un uccello. Alcuni uccelli sono creature che costruiscono nidi. Qualsiasi struzzo è un uccello che depone le uova. Non esistono pinguini che non depongono le uova. Non esistono polli che non siano uccelli. È il caso che alcune galline depongano le uova.

syllogism: It is a fact that fur is a type of metal. Every single fox is a type of vegetable. Some puppies hatch from eggs. There are no dogs which are animals. All wolves are made of plastic. Anything that is a dog is a canine. Some canines are not, in fact, animals.
syllogism_t: È un dato di fatto che la pelliccia è un tipo di metallo. Ogni singola volpe è un tipo di verdura. Alcuni cuccioli si schiudono dalle uova. Non esistono cani che siano animali. Tutti i lupi sono fatti di plastica. Tutto ciò che è un cane è un canide. Alcuni canidi non sono, infatti, animali.

syllogism: There are no people who age. It is a fact that all women never die. Every single man is a god. Every single mortal is immortal. Some children are eternal beings. It is true that some humans are mortals. This makes it true that every human is immortal.
syllogism_t: Non esistono persone che invecchiano. È un dato di fatto che tutte le donne non muoiono mai. Ogni singolo uomo è un dio. Ogni singolo mortale è immortale. Alcuni bambini sono esseri eterni. È vero che alcuni esseri umani sono mortali. Ciò rende vero che ogni essere umano è immortale.

syllogism: Someone who is an unmarried man is a person. Every society has different customs regarding family. It is true that marriage is a legal contract. Many men choose to remain single for their careers. Every single bachelor is a person. It follows from this that all bachelors are unmarried men.
syllogism_t: Qualcuno che è un uomo non sposato è una persona. Ogni società ha usanze diverse riguardo alla famiglia. È vero che il matrimonio è un contratto legale. Molti uomini scelgono di rimanere single per la loro carriera. Ogni singolo scapolo è una persona. Ne consegue che tutti gli scapoli sono uomini non sposati.

syllogism: Anything that is a rose is also a plant. It is known that sunlight helps photosynthesis. Many people enjoy the scent of blooming roses. Some plants require daily watering. Every botanist studies the life of plants. All gardens contain various species of flora. There exist roses that are flowers. It necessarily follows that some flowers are plants.
syllogism_t: Tutto ciò che è una rosa è anche una pianta. È noto che la luce solare aiuta la fotosintesi. Molte persone apprezzano il profumo delle rose in fiore. Alcune piante richiedono annaffiature giornaliere. Ogni botanico studia la vita delle piante. Tutti i giardini contengono varie specie di flora. Esistono rose che sono fiori. Ne consegue necessariamente che alcuni fiori sono piante.

syllogism: Not a single thing that is a vertebrate is a mammal. Some animals lay eggs in jelly. Every ecosystem has a food chain. It is true that skin can be permeable. It is a fact that every single frog is a vertebrate. It must be the case that no frog is a mammal.
syllogism_t: Non una sola cosa che sia un vertebrato è un mammifero. Alcuni animali depongono le uova in gelatina. Ogni ecosistema ha una catena alimentare. È vero che la pelle può essere permeabile. È un dato di fatto che ogni singola rana è un vertebrato. Deve essere vero che nessuna rana è un mammifero.

syllogism: Some rugs are made of liquid water. Every table has feelings and thoughts. There are no pieces of furniture that are plants. All sofas are living animals. Not a single plant is a chair. It is the case that a portion of chairs are not furniture.
syllogism_t: Alcuni tappeti sono fatti di acqua liquida. Ogni tavolo racchiude sentimenti e pensieri. Non ci sono mobili che siano piante. Tutti i divani sono animali vivi. Nessuna pianta è una sedia. È vero che una parte delle sedie non è un mobile.

syllogism: All cats are also members of the animal kingdom. Some pets are trained to perform tricks. It is true that zoology is the study of animals. Many creatures inhabit the forests of the world. Every mammal is an animal. It is a known fact that all dogs are animals. Thus, it follows that any and all dogs are mammals.
syllogism_t: Tutti i gatti appartengono anche al regno animale. Alcuni animali domestici sono addestrati a eseguire acrobazie. È vero che la zoologia è lo studio degli animali. Molte creature abitano le foreste del mondo. Ogni mammifero è un animale. È risaputo che tutti i cani sono animali. Pertanto, ne consegue che tutti i cani sono mammiferi.

syllogism: Anyone who is a doctor is a human. There are no ghosts who are doctors. Any teacher is a person. Some beings are not doctors. Every single nurse is a human. There are no aliens who are doctors. Consequently, no alien is a doctor.
syllogism_t: Chiunque sia un medico è un essere umano. Non esistono fantasmi che siano medici. Ogni insegnante è una persona. Alcuni esseri non sono medici. Ogni singola infermiera è un essere umano. Non esistono alieni che siano medici. Di conseguenza, nessuno straniero è un medico.

syllogism: There are a few mammals that are horses. Any cat is a mammal. Some mammals are rabbits. Every single goldfish is a pet. Every single dog is a mammal. It is true that all hamsters are pets. Anything that is a pet is a mammal. A number of pets are dogs.
syllogism_t: Ci sono alcuni mammiferi che sono cavalli. Qualsiasi gatto è un mammifero. Alcuni mammiferi sono conigli. Ogni singolo pesce rosso è un animale domestico. Ogni singolo cane è un mammifero. È vero che tutti i criceti sono animali domestici. Tutto ciò che è un animale domestico è un mammifero. Un certo numero di animali domestici sono cani.

syllogism: Some skyscrapers are not birds. It is the case that all bears are animals. Any lion is a creature. Anything that is a bird is an animal. There are no bridges that are birds. Every single tiger is an animal. The set of buildings contains no birds. There are some buildings which are not animals.
syllogism_t: Alcuni grattacieli non sono uccelli. È vero che tutti gli orsi sono animali. Qualsiasi leone è una creatura. Tutto ciò che è un uccello è un animale. Non ci sono ponti che siano uccelli. Ogni singola tigre è un animale. L'insieme degli edifici non contiene uccelli. Ci sono alcuni edifici che non sono animali.

syllogism: Any person who is a baker is someone who prepares food. Some waiters are a people that serve food. It is the case that many people who prepare food are home cooks. Some cooks are people who work in restaurants. Every single person who is a chef is a cook. All sous-chefs are people who work in kitchens. Every cook is a person who prepares food. It necessarily follows that some of the people who prepare food are chefs.
syllogism_t: Chiunque sia un fornaio è qualcuno che prepara il cibo. Alcuni camerieri sono persone che servono cibo. È vero che molte persone che preparano il cibo sono cuochi casalinghi. Alcuni cuochi sono persone che lavorano nei ristoranti. Ogni singola persona che è uno chef è un cuoco. Tutti i sous-chef sono persone che lavorano nelle cucine. Ogni cuoco è una persona che prepara il cibo. Ne consegue necessariamente che alcune delle persone che preparano il cibo sono chef.

syllogism: All deserts are filled with deep water. No boat has ever floated on water. It is the case that all oceans are dry. Some rain is actually hot sand. Every single fish is afraid of water. It is true that the Pacific Ocean is a desert. Some bodies of water are oceans. Consequently, some bodies of water are dry.
syllogism_t: Tutti i deserti sono pieni di acque profonde. Nessuna barca ha mai galleggiato sull’acqua. È vero che tutti gli oceani sono asciutti. Alcune piogge sono in realtà sabbia calda. Ogni singolo pesce ha paura dell'acqua. È vero che l’Oceano Pacifico è un deserto. Alcuni corpi d'acqua sono oceani. Di conseguenza, alcuni corpi idrici sono asciutti.

syllogism: There are some birds that are airplanes. Some clouds are made of feathers. All helicopters lay eggs in nests. No machine has ever flown in the sky. Every single airplane is a thing that can fly. It follows from this that every single thing that can fly is a bird.
syllogism_t: Ci sono alcuni uccelli che sono aeroplani. Alcune nuvole sono fatte di piume. Tutti gli elicotteri depongono le uova nei nidi. Nessuna macchina ha mai volato in cielo. Ogni singolo aereo è una cosa che può volare. Ne consegue che ogni singola cosa che può volare è un uccello.

syllogism: Some animals give birth to live young. Every spider spins a unique web. All bugs have exoskeletons for protection. Many small creatures live in the grass. It is known that ants live in colonies. There is no single insect that is a mammal. Certain beetles are counted among the insects. It follows that not every beetle is a mammal.
syllogism_t: Alcuni animali danno alla luce piccoli vivi. Ogni ragno tesse una tela unica. Tutti gli insetti hanno esoscheletri per protezione. Molte piccole creature vivono nell'erba. È noto che le formiche vivono in colonie. Non esiste un singolo insetto che sia un mammifero. Alcuni coleotteri sono annoverati tra gli insetti. Ne consegue che non tutti gli scarabei sono mammiferi.

syllogism: Every student brings supplies to school. It is true that lead is a form of graphite. There are erasers attached to the end of pencils. All artists use various tools to create sketches. Some writing instruments are made of plastic. There are no pencils which are not writing instruments. There are no pencils which are not objects with lead. Therefore, some objects with lead are writing instruments.
syllogism_t: Ogni studente porta il materiale a scuola. È vero che il piombo è una forma di grafite. Ci sono gomme attaccate all'estremità delle matite. Tutti gli artisti utilizzano vari strumenti per creare schizzi. Alcuni strumenti da scrittura sono realizzati in plastica. Non esistono matite che non siano strumenti di scrittura. Non esistono matite che non siano oggetti con mina. Pertanto alcuni oggetti contenenti piombo sono strumenti di scrittura.

syllogism: Some vertebrates are creatures that live in the ocean. It is a fact that all robins are flying animals. Anything that is a sparrow is a bird. There are a few birds that cannot fly. Any animal that is a hawk is a vertebrate. Every creature that is a bird is a vertebrate. It must be the case that a few vertebrates are sparrows.
syllogism_t: Algunos vertebrados son criaturas que viven en el océano. Es un hecho que todos los petirrojos son animales voladores. Todo lo que es un gorrión es un pájaro. Hay algunas aves que no pueden volar. Cualquier animal que sea halcón es un vertebrado. Cada criatura que es un pájaro es un vertebrado. Debe darse el caso de que algunos vertebrados sean gorriones.

syllogism: All bands practice before a concert. Many songs are written with emotion. It is common for artists to collaborate. Every orchestra has a conductor. Some instruments are difficult to learn. There are some creative people that are composers. All composers are musicians. It follows from this that every single musician is a creative person.
syllogism_t: Todas las bandas practican antes de un concierto. Muchas canciones están escritas con emoción. Es común que los artistas colaboren. Cada orquesta tiene un director. Algunos instrumentos son difíciles de aprender. Hay algunas personas creativas que son compositores. Todos los compositores son músicos. De esto se desprende que cada músico es una persona creativa.

syllogism: Some insects are whales. It is a fact that all birds are reptiles. It is true that everything that is a cat is a mammal. Any fish is a type of mammal. There are no horses that are animals. Every single dog is a bird. It is also true that all mammals are animals. Thus, it is concluded that all animals are cats.
syllogism_t: Algunos insectos son ballenas. Es un hecho que todas las aves son reptiles. Es cierto que todo lo que es gato es un mamífero. Cualquier pez es un tipo de mamífero. No hay caballos que sean animales. Cada perro es un pájaro. También es cierto que todos los mamíferos son animales. Así, se concluye que todos los animales son gatos.

syllogism: Every single ghost is a mythical creature. It is true that unicorns live in city parks. No storybook has ever been fictional. Some mythical creatures are real politicians. There exist some ghosts which are also humans. Therefore, it is the case that some humans are mythical creatures.
syllogism_t: Cada fantasma es una criatura mítica. Es cierto que los unicornios viven en los parques de las ciudades. Ningún libro de cuentos ha sido jamás ficticio. Algunas criaturas míticas son verdaderos políticos. Existen algunos fantasmas que también son humanos. Por tanto, se da el caso de que algunos humanos son criaturas míticas.

syllogism: All airplanes swim underwater like fish. Every star is actually a giant marshmallow. Each and every cloud is a airplane. Some vehicles are grown in gardens. There are no clouds that are stars. Therefore, there are no vehicles that are airplanes.
syllogism_t: Todos los aviones nadan bajo el agua como peces. Cada estrella es en realidad un malvavisco gigante. Todas y cada una de las nubes son un avión. Algunos vehículos se cultivan en jardines. No hay nubes que sean estrellas. Por tanto, no existen vehículos que sean aviones.

syllogism: There are some foods that are not vegetables. Every single carrot is a food. It is true that all lettuce is a vegetable. Anything which is a cucumber is also a food. Any tomato is a vegetable. Every cucumber is a vegetable. We can infer that a few vegetables are foods.
syllogism_t: Hay algunos alimentos que no son vegetales. Cada zanahoria es un alimento. Es cierto que toda lechuga es una verdura. Todo lo que sea pepino también es alimento. Cualquier tomate es una verdura. Cada pepino es una verdura. Podemos inferir que algunas verduras son alimentos.

syllogism: It is true that all newspapers are invisible. There are no encyclopedias that contain words. All books are things that are written works. Any poem is a silent sound. Every single novel is a blank page. Not a single dictionary is a written work. Consequently, no dictionary is a book.
syllogism_t: Es cierto que todos los periódicos son invisibles. No existen enciclopedias que contengan palabras. Todos los libros son cosas que son obras escritas. Cualquier poema es un sonido silencioso. Cada novela es una página en blanco. Ningún diccionario es una obra escrita. En consecuencia, ningún diccionario es un libro.

syllogism: Any bear is a type of beetle. It is a fact that all wolves are bugs. There are no giraffes that are mammals. Any lion is an insect. It is true that no insect is a mammal. This leads to the conclusion that no mammal is a lion.
syllogism_t: Cualquier oso es una especie de escarabajo. Es un hecho que todos los lobos son insectos. No hay jirafas que sean mamíferos. Cualquier león es un insecto. Es cierto que ningún insecto es mamífero. Esto lleva a la conclusión de que ningún mamífero es un león.

syllogism: Every single broccoli is a vegetable. It is true that all fruits are edible. Any potato is a vegetable. Some edible things are grains. There are a few roots that are edible. Every single vegetable is edible. Anything that is a carrot is a vegetable. There are no carrots that are not edible.
syllogism_t: Cada brócoli es una verdura. Es cierto que todas las frutas son comestibles. Cualquier patata es una verdura. Algunas cosas comestibles son granos. Hay algunas raíces que son comestibles. Cada vegetal es comestible. Todo lo que es una zanahoria es una verdura. No hay zanahorias que no sean comestibles.

syllogism: Any rain is actually a stone. Every single river is made of ice. It is true that all oceans are frozen solid. There are no drinks that are liquid. Every single bit of a liquid is solid. Some steam is a block of wood. No solids are water. This implies that some water is not liquid.
syllogism_t: Cualquier lluvia es en realidad una piedra. Cada río está hecho de hielo. Es cierto que todos los océanos están congelados. No hay bebidas que sean líquidas. Cada partícula de un líquido es sólida. Algo de vapor es un bloque de madera. Ningún sólido es agua. Esto implica que parte del agua no es líquida.

syllogism: No driver has ever looked at a map. Every novel has an engine and four wheels. Some stories are written on asphalt roads. All highways are actually library shelves. It is a fact that you can read a steering wheel. A number of cars are books. Everything that is a book has pages. Therefore, a portion of things that have pages are cars.
syllogism_t: Ningún conductor ha mirado jamás un mapa. Cada novela tiene un motor y cuatro ruedas. Algunas historias se escriben sobre caminos asfaltados. Todas las carreteras son en realidad estanterías de biblioteca. Es un hecho que puedes leer un volante. Varios coches son libros. Todo lo que es un libro tiene páginas. Por tanto, una parte de las cosas que tienen páginas son coches.

syllogism: Any thing that is a number is a concept. Some equations are animals. It is a fact that all ideas are made of wood. Every single letter is a vegetable. The number three is not a concept. From this, three is not a number.
syllogism_t: Todo lo que es un número es un concepto. Algunas ecuaciones son animales. Es un hecho que todas las ideas están hechas de madera. Cada letra es un vegetal. El número tres no es un concepto. De esto se deduce que tres no es un número.

syllogism: Some birds are things that can fly. It is true that some things, which are birds, are not penguins. There are no fish that are not vertebrates. Any eagle is a bird. Anything that is a bird is a vertebrate. This leads to the conclusion that some vertebrates are not penguins.
syllogism_t: Algunas aves son cosas que pueden volar. Es cierto que algunas cosas, que son pájaros, no son pingüinos. No hay peces que no sean vertebrados. Cualquier águila es un pájaro. Todo lo que es un pájaro es un vertebrado. Esto lleva a la conclusión de que algunos vertebrados no son pingüinos.

syllogism: There are no leaves that are organic matter. Any object that is a rose is also a flower. Every single tree is a piece of plastic. Some flowers are made of stone. There is no plant which is a rose. This means that no plant is a flower.
syllogism_t: No hay hojas que sean materia orgánica. Cualquier objeto que sea una rosa también es una flor. Cada árbol es un trozo de plástico. Algunas flores están hechas de piedra. No hay planta que sea una rosa. Esto significa que ninguna planta es una flor.

syllogism: Every planet is shaped like a pyramid. The sun revolves around the earth every hour. All galaxies are small enough to fit in a pocket. Nothing that is a star is a celestial body. Some stars are made of ice and snow. Every single planet is a celestial body. It follows from this that all planets are stars.
syllogism_t: Cada planeta tiene forma de pirámide. El sol gira alrededor de la tierra cada hora. Todas las galaxias son lo suficientemente pequeñas como para caber en un bolsillo. Nada de lo que es una estrella es un cuerpo celeste. Algunas estrellas están hechas de hielo y nieve. Cada planeta es un cuerpo celeste. De esto se deduce que todos los planetas son estrellas.

syllogism: Every single mountain is made of jelly. It is true that people breathe sand instead of air. Each and every stone is a liquid. No stone has ever been found on the ground. All stones are substances which can be breathed. Therefore, it is the case that some breathable substances are liquids.
syllogism_t: Cada montaña está hecha de gelatina. Es cierto que la gente respira arena en lugar de aire. Todas y cada una de las piedras son un líquido. Nunca se ha encontrado ninguna piedra en el suelo. Todas las piedras son sustancias respirables. Por tanto, se da el caso de que algunas sustancias respirables sean líquidas.

syllogism: Many artists enjoy expressing themselves creatively. Every musician requires practice to master their craft. All symphonies are typically played by orchestras. It is the case that no painter is a composer of symphonies. There are famous painters who lived in the 19th century. Some people appreciate both music and visual art. Every person who is a composer is a composer of symphonies. The implication is that a part of composers are not painters.
syllogism_t: Muchos artistas disfrutan expresándose creativamente. Todo músico requiere práctica para dominar su oficio. Todas las sinfonías suelen ser interpretadas por orquestas. Es cierto que ningún pintor es compositor de sinfonías. Hay pintores famosos que vivieron en el siglo XIX. Algunas personas aprecian tanto la música como el arte visual. Todo aquel que es compositor es un compositor de sinfonías. La implicación es que una parte de los compositores no son pintores.

syllogism: Any horse is a type of vegetable. It is true that some creatures classified as dogs are not animals. It is a fact that all cows are minerals. Every single cat is a robot. Some pigs are made of plastic. There are no sheep that are living beings. It is also true that every single creature which is a dog is a mammal. From this, we can logically deduce that some creatures that are mammals are not animals.
syllogism_t: Cualquier caballo es un tipo de vegetal. Es cierto que algunas criaturas clasificadas como perros no son animales. Es un hecho que todas las vacas son minerales. Cada gato es un robot. Algunos cerdos están hechos de plástico. No existen ovejas que sean seres vivos. También es cierto que toda criatura que sea un perro es un mamífero. De esto podemos deducir lógicamente que algunas criaturas que son mamíferos no son animales.

syllogism: Any object that is a car is a vehicle. There are no vans that are not vehicles. Every truck is a type of vehicle. Any coupe is a type of car. All sedans are, without exception, cars. Consequently, there are no sedans that are not vehicles.
syllogism_t: Tout objet qui est une voiture est un véhicule. Il n’y a pas de fourgonnettes qui ne soient pas des véhicules. Chaque camion est un type de véhicule. Tout coupé est un type de voiture. Toutes les berlines sont, sans exception, des voitures. Il n’existe donc pas de berlines qui ne soient pas des véhicules.

syllogism: All lizards enjoy basking in the sun. Most frogs lay their eggs in water. No animal that is a reptile is an amphibian. It is true that biological classification is complex. A few snakes are to be found among the reptiles. It must be the case that some snakes are not amphibians.
syllogism_t: Tous les lézards aiment se prélasser au soleil. La plupart des grenouilles pondent leurs œufs dans l'eau. Aucun animal reptile n’est un amphibien. Il est vrai que la classification biologique est complexe. Parmi les reptiles, on trouve quelques serpents. Il doit être vrai que certains serpents ne sont pas des amphibiens.

syllogism: Every single puppy is born knowing how to speak French. No canine has ever walked on four legs. There exist no animals that are also canines. It is undeniable that the sky is green and the grass is blue. All dogs are actually disguised robots from space. Some animals are made entirely of glass. The entire set of dogs is a part of the canines. There are no animals which are dogs.
syllogism_t: Chaque chiot naît en sachant parler français. Aucun chien n’a jamais marché sur quatre pattes. Il n’existe pas d’animaux qui soient aussi des chiens. Il est indéniable que le ciel est vert et l’herbe bleue. Tous les chiens sont en réalité des robots déguisés venus de l’espace. Certains animaux sont entièrement en verre. L’ensemble des chiens fait partie des canines. Il n'y a pas d'animaux qui soient des chiens.

syllogism: Some elephants are not animals. There are no monkeys that are creatures. Every single tiger is a mineral. Any lion is a plant. It is true that all bears are ghosts. A mammal is never a type of animal. Every single giraffe is a mammal. Thus, there is no such thing as a giraffe that is an animal.
syllogism_t: Certains éléphants ne sont pas des animaux. Il n’existe pas de singes qui soient des créatures. Chaque tigre est un minéral. Tout lion est une plante. Il est vrai que tous les ours sont des fantômes. Un mammifère n'est jamais un type d'animal. Chaque girafe est un mammifère. Ainsi, la girafe n’est pas un animal.

syllogism: Every traveler needs a passport. All continents have many countries. A number of Europeans are German. Most cities have public transportation. Some people speak multiple languages. It is true that history shapes borders. Of all the Berliners, a portion are German. It must be the case that some Berliners are Europeans.
syllogism_t: Chaque voyageur a besoin d'un passeport. Tous les continents comptent de nombreux pays. Un certain nombre d'Européens sont allemands. La plupart des villes disposent de transports en commun. Certaines personnes parlent plusieurs langues. Il est vrai que l’histoire façonne les frontières. Parmi tous les Berlinois, une partie est allemande. Il est vrai que certains Berlinois sont européens.

syllogism: Any tulip is a plant. It is true that all oaks are plants. Every single daisy is a flower. Every rose is a plant. Some mushrooms are fungi. There are some fungi that are not plants. It is the case that some fungi are not roses.
syllogism_t: Toute tulipe est une plante. Il est vrai que tous les chênes sont des plantes. Chaque marguerite est une fleur. Chaque rose est une plante. Certains champignons sont des champignons. Certains champignons ne sont pas des plantes. Il arrive que certains champignons ne soient pas des roses.

syllogism: Any bird has wings. Any cat has a beak. Every single dog has feathers. It is true that all elephants can fly. There are no ants that are birds. There are some insects that do not have wings. From this, all insects are birds.
syllogism_t: Tout oiseau a des ailes. Tout chat a un bec. Chaque chien a des plumes. Il est vrai que tous les éléphants savent voler. Il n'y a pas de fourmis qui soient des oiseaux. Certains insectes n'ont pas d'ailes. De là, tous les insectes sont des oiseaux.

syllogism: All oceans cover a large part of the Earth. Every living thing needs hydration. It is a fact that rivers flow into the sea. Any and all water is a fluid. There are some forms of water that are liquids. It necessarily follows that some liquids are fluids.
syllogism_t: Tous les océans couvrent une grande partie de la Terre. Tout être vivant a besoin d’hydratation. C’est un fait que les rivières se jettent dans la mer. Toute eau est un fluide. Certaines formes d’eau sont liquides. Il s’ensuit nécessairement que certains liquides sont des fluides.

syllogism: All webs are made of honey. No bee has ever had a stinger. It is true that anything that is a bee is an insect. Every tarantula has wings and can fly. There exist some insects which are spiders. It is suggested that every spider is a bee.
syllogism_t: Toutes les toiles sont faites de miel. Aucune abeille n'a jamais eu de dard. Il est vrai que tout ce qui est une abeille est un insecte. Chaque tarentule a des ailes et peut voler. Il existe des insectes qui sont des araignées. Il est suggéré que chaque araignée soit une abeille.

syllogism: Some rivers are bodies of water. It is true that the Atlantic is an ocean. Every ocean is a body of water. There are no ponds that are not bodies of water. Anything that is the Pacific Ocean is an ocean. It is the case that some part of the Pacific Ocean is a body of water.
syllogism_t: Certaines rivières sont des plans d'eau. Il est vrai que l'Atlantique est un océan. Chaque océan est une masse d’eau. Il n’y a pas d’étangs qui ne soient pas des plans d’eau. Tout ce qui constitue l'océan Pacifique est un océan. Il est vrai qu’une partie de l’océan Pacifique est une masse d’eau.

syllogism: It is true that all doctors are aliens. Any man is a reptile. Every single child is an insect. There are no scientists who are biological organisms. Some teachers are ghosts. It is not true that every woman is a mammal. Every single woman is a human. Thus, it can be concluded that some humans are not mammals.
syllogism_t: Il est vrai que tous les médecins sont des extraterrestres. Tout homme est un reptile. Chaque enfant est un insecte. Aucun scientifique n’est un organisme biologique. Certains enseignants sont des fantômes. Ce n’est pas vrai que chaque femme est un mammifère. Chaque femme est un être humain. Ainsi, on peut conclure que certains humains ne sont pas des mammifères.

syllogism: Nothing that is a plant can be considered a reptile. Any flower is a plant. Every single lizard is a reptile. Some animals are reptiles. There are no grasses that are reptiles. It is true that all bushes are plants. Everything that is a tree is, without exception, a plant. It therefore follows that there are no trees that are reptiles.
syllogism_t: Rien de ce qui est une plante ne peut être considéré comme un reptile. Toute fleur est une plante. Chaque lézard est un reptile. Certains animaux sont des reptiles. Il n’existe pas d’herbes qui soient des reptiles. Il est vrai que tous les buissons sont des plantes. Tout ce qui est un arbre est, sans exception, une plante. Il s’ensuit donc qu’il n’y a pas d’arbres qui soient des reptiles.

syllogism: Each and every oak is a tree. It is known that wood is used for building. All forests contribute to the planet's oxygen supply. There are many types of trees found in nature. Every plant requires water and light to survive. All oaks are plants which bear acorns. Therefore, it is the case that some plants with acorns are trees.
syllogism_t: Chaque chêne est un arbre. On sait que le bois est utilisé pour la construction. Toutes les forêts contribuent à l'approvisionnement en oxygène de la planète. Il existe de nombreux types d’arbres dans la nature. Chaque plante a besoin d’eau et de lumière pour survivre. Tous les chênes sont des plantes qui portent des glands. Il est donc vrai que certaines plantes à glands sont des arbres.

syllogism: Every single bus is a vehicle. Some rollers skates are toys. Any bicycle is a mode of transport. There are no trains that are not vehicles. It is true that all trucks are vehicles. Anything which is a car is a vehicle. There are some skateboards which are not vehicles. This logically leads to the conclusion that some skateboards are not cars.
syllogism_t: Chaque bus est un véhicule. Certains patins à roulettes sont des jouets. Tout vélo est un mode de transport. Il n’y a pas de trains qui ne soient pas des véhicules. Il est vrai que tous les camions sont des véhicules. Tout ce qui est une voiture est un véhicule. Certains skateboards ne sont pas des véhicules. Cela conduit logiquement à la conclusion que certains skateboards ne sont pas des voitures.

syllogism: Some creatures are not mammals. Any and all dogs are mammals. It is the case that all horses are mammals. Every single cat is a mammal. Any animal that is a whale is a mammal. Some animals are not dogs. It follows that some animals are not mammals.
syllogism_t: Certaines créatures ne sont pas des mammifères. Tous les chiens sont des mammifères. Il est vrai que tous les chevaux sont des mammifères. Chaque chat est un mammifère. Tout animal qui est une baleine est un mammifère. Certains animaux ne sont pas des chiens. Il s’ensuit que certains animaux ne sont pas des mammifères.

syllogism: Any dog is a reptile. There are no lions that are mammals. Every single whale has feathers. Every mammal has hair. It is a fact that all monkeys are fish. Some bears are birds. It is also the case that every cat has hair. Consequently, there are cats who are not mammals.
syllogism_t: Tout chien est un reptile. Il n’existe pas de lions qui soient des mammifères. Chaque baleine a des plumes. Chaque mammifère a des poils. C'est un fait que tous les singes sont des poissons. Certains ours sont des oiseaux. Il est également vrai que chaque chat a des poils. Il existe donc des chats qui ne sont pas des mammifères.

syllogism: Every park has different species of plants. Some climates support evergreen forests. All forests change colors in the autumn. Many leaves fall to the ground in winter. Among maples, there are some which are deciduous. Every single maple tree is, by definition, a tree. It must be the case that some trees are deciduous.
syllogism_t: Chaque parc possède des espèces de plantes différentes. Certains climats abritent des forêts à feuilles persistantes. Toutes les forêts changent de couleur en automne. De nombreuses feuilles tombent au sol en hiver. Parmi les érables, il y en a qui sont à feuilles caduques. Chaque érable est, par définition, un arbre. Il se peut que certains arbres soient à feuilles caduques.

syllogism: Some electronics are televisions. Every single phone is an electronic device. There are no magazines that are electronics. It is true that all novels are books. Anything that is a computer is an electronic device. None of the electronic devices are books. This proves that no book is a computer.
syllogism_t: Certains appareils électroniques sont des téléviseurs. Chaque téléphone est un appareil électronique. Il n’existe pas de magazines électroniques. Il est vrai que tous les romans sont des livres. Tout ce qui est un ordinateur est un appareil électronique. Aucun des appareils électroniques n’est un livre. Cela prouve qu’aucun livre n’est un ordinateur.

syllogism: It is a fact that all comets are mozzarella. Every single moon is made of cheddar. Some galaxies are made of swiss cheese. There are no black holes that are not provolone. Any asteroid is a block of gouda. Any celestial body that is a star is made of cheese. Some suns are not made of cheese. Therefore, it is the case that some suns are not stars.
syllogism_t: 事实上，所有彗星都是马苏里拉奶酪。每个月亮都是由切达干酪制成的。有些星系是由瑞士奶酪制成的。没有什么黑洞不是波罗沃龙干酪的。任何小行星都是高达块。任何恒星天体都是由奶酪制成的。有些太阳不是由奶酪制成的。因此，有些太阳并不是恒星。

syllogism: Not a single marine animal lives in saltwater. There is not one whale that is a mammal. It is a fact that all mammals lay eggs made of solid gold. All oceans are made of sparkling soda water. Every single fish flies in the sky instead of swimming. Every humpback whale is a whale. Therefore, some humpback whales are not mammals.
syllogism_t: 没有任何海洋动物生活在咸水中。没有一只鲸鱼是哺乳动物。事实上，所有哺乳动物都会产下由纯金制成的蛋。所有的海洋都是由苏打水组成的。每条鱼都在天上飞，而不是游泳。每头座头鲸都是鲸鱼。因此，有些座头鲸不是哺乳动物。

syllogism: Every single canine is a mammal. Some animals are carnivorous hunters. Many breeds of dogs are domesticated. It is a fact that mammals have warm blood. Anything that is a mammal is a dog. This implies that every dog is a canine.
syllogism_t: 每只犬科动物都是哺乳动物。有些动物是肉食性猎人。许多品种的狗都被驯化。哺乳动物有温血，这是事实。任何哺乳动物都是狗。这意味着每只狗都是犬科动物。

syllogism: It is a fact that all grapes are rocks. There are no fruits which are vegetables. Every single banana is a steak. There are no cherries that are edible. It is also true that no vegetable is an apple. It follows from this that no apple is a fruit.
syllogism_t: 事实是，所有的葡萄都是石头。没有水果是蔬菜。每一根香蕉都是一块牛排。没有可以食用的樱桃。确实，没有一种蔬菜是苹果。由此可见，没有苹果是水果。

syllogism: No object exists without four tires. Some clouds are driven on the highway. Every single car is a vehicle. It is a fact that trees have engines. All apples are motorized vehicles. Every single rock has a steering wheel. All vehicles are objects. Therefore, we can conclude that every object is a car.
syllogism_t: 没有四个轮胎就不存在任何物体。一些云在高速公路上行驶。每辆车都是一辆车。树木有发动机，这是事实。所有苹果都是机动车辆。每一块岩石都有一个方向盘。所有车辆都是物体。因此，我们可以得出结论，每个物体都是一辆汽车。

syllogism: Among the things that are stars, some are houses. Some asteroids have living rooms inside. It is a fact that the moon is a two-story apartment. No galaxy is bigger than a garden shed. All stars are celestial objects. It follows that some celestial objects are houses.
syllogism_t: 在星星的事物中，有一些是房子。有些小行星内部有客厅。月亮是一座两层公寓，这是事实。没有哪个星系比花园小屋更大。所有的星星都是天体。由此可见，一些天体是房屋。

syllogism: Every item that is a chair is a piece of furniture. It is true that all sofas are furniture. There are no pencils that are furniture. Every single desk is an item of furniture. Some magazines are not furniture. No books are items of furniture. There are certain books that are not chairs.
syllogism_t: 每件椅子都是一件家具。确实，所有沙发都是家具。没有铅笔是家具。每一张桌子都是一件家具。有些杂志不是家具。没有一本书是家具。有些书不是椅子。

syllogism: It is common for families to adopt dogs from shelters. All mammals nurse their young with milk. Every person who is a dog is a mammal. Every single pet requires food and water to live. There are a number of things that are pets that are also mammals. It follows from this that there are some pets that are dogs.
syllogism_t: 家庭从收容所收养狗是很常见的事情。所有哺乳动物都用乳汁哺育幼崽。每个狗都是哺乳动物。每只宠物都需要食物和水才能生存。有很多动物既是宠物又是哺乳动物。由此可见，有一些宠物是狗。

syllogism: There are no cars which are vegetables. There are no motorcycles that are not salads. Some trains are edible plants. It is true that all airplanes are fruits. Every single truck is a leafy green. Some vehicles are cars. This implies that every vehicle is a vegetable.
syllogism_t: 没有汽车是蔬菜。没有不是沙拉的摩托车。有些火车是可食用的植物。确实，所有飞机都是水果。每一辆卡车都是绿叶茂盛的。有些车辆是汽车。这意味着每辆车都是蔬菜。

syllogism: It is a fact that all presidents have scales. Every single mayor is a cold-blooded lizard. Any governor is actually a snake. There are no politicians who are not reptiles. Some judges are amphibians. There are no congressmen who are humans. Anything which is a senator is a politician. We can derive that some senators are reptiles.
syllogism_t: 事实是，所有总统都有天平。每个市长都是冷血蜥蜴。任何统治者实际上都是一条蛇。没有哪个政治家不是爬行动物。有些法官是两栖动物。国会议员中没有人是人类。凡是参议员就是政客。我们可以推断，有些参议员是爬行动物。

syllogism: Many devices require electricity to run. All machines are built by humans. Some technology is made of silicon and metal. It is known that software runs on hardware. Every invention serves a specific purpose. Things that are computers are in no way organic. Anything that is a computer is also a tool. There exist tools that are not organic things.
syllogism_t: 许多设备需要电力才能运行。所有机器都是由人类制造的。有些技术是由硅和金属制成的。众所周知，软件是在硬件上运行的。每项发明都有特定的目的。计算机之类的东西绝不是有机的。任何计算机也是一种工具。存在一些不是有机物的工具。

syllogism: It is true that lamps are actually fruits. There are no tables that are objects. Every sofa can fly around the room. All chairs are living creatures. No room has ever contained a bed. Some desks are made of frozen water. Every single table is a furniture. Some furnitures fail to be objects.
syllogism_t: 确实，灯实际上是水果。没有表是对象。每张沙发都可以在房间里飞来飞去。所有的椅子都是活物。没有一个房间有床。有些桌子是由冰水制成的。每一张桌子都是一件家具。有些家具不能成为物体。

syllogism: Some colors are brighter than others. Many tourists visit Paris every year. It is a fact that creativity is universal. A portion of artists are French citizens. Every culture has its own art forms. It is known that some painters are French citizens. It must be true that some painters are artists.
syllogism_t: 有些颜色比其他颜色更亮。每年都有许多游客参观巴黎。创造力是普遍存在的，这是事实。一部分艺术家是法国公民。每种文化都有自己的艺术形式。众所周知，一些画家是法国公民。确实有些画家是艺术家。

syllogism: There are no planets that are objects in space. It is a fact that all moons are made of cardboard. There are no asteroids that orbit the sun. Every single star is a drawing on paper. Some comets are not in space. Any galaxy is a small toy. All of the things that are Jupiters are planets. This means some of the things that are Jupiters are not objects in space.
syllogism_t: 没有行星是太空中的物体。事实上，所有的卫星都是由纸板制成的。没有绕太阳运行的小行星。每一颗星星都是纸上的图画。有些彗星不在太空中。任何星系都是一个小玩具。所有属于木星的东西都是行星。这意味着木星上的一些物体并不是太空中的物体。

syllogism: There are no skateboards that are cars. Any vehicle that is a Ford is a car. Any motorcycle is a two-wheeled vehicle. It is true that all Toyotas are cars. Some vehicles are not cars. Every single Chevrolet is a car. There are no bicycles that are cars. It's impossible for any bicycle to be a Ford.
syllogism_t: 没有滑板是汽车。任何福特汽车都是汽车。任何摩托车都是两轮车辆。确实，所有丰田汽车都是汽车。有些车辆不是汽车。每一辆雪佛兰都是一辆汽车。没有自行车是汽车。任何自行车都不可能是福特的。

syllogism: Some animals are made of pure electricity. All elephants are actually plants. It is a fact that fur prevents movement. Every single dog is an animal. It is a fact that not a single mammal is a dog. It must be the case that no mammal is an animal.
syllogism_t: 有些动物是由纯电构成的。所有大象实际上都是植物。事实上，皮毛会阻碍运动。每只狗都是一种动物。事实上，没有任何一种哺乳动物是狗。肯定没有哺乳动物是动物。

syllogism: Every single bus is an automobile. It is true that all vans are vehicles. Any truck is a vehicle. There are a few vehicles that are not cars. Every automobile is a vehicle. There are some cars which are automobiles. It follows that every single car is a vehicle.
syllogism_t: 每一辆公共汽车都是一辆汽车。确实，所有货车都是车辆。任何卡车都是车辆。有一些车辆不是汽车。每辆汽车都是交通工具。有一些汽车是汽车。由此可见，每辆车都是一辆车。

syllogism: Some mammals live in the wild. Every animal has unique characteristics. Anything which is a dog is a mammal. Many families enjoy having animals at home. Some pets happen to be mammals. Thus, it follows that some pets are dogs.
syllogism_t: 有些哺乳动物生活在野外。每种动物都有独特的特征。任何狗都是哺乳动物。许多家庭喜欢在家养动物。有些宠物恰好是哺乳动物。因此，有些宠物是狗。

syllogism: Some bodies of water are known to be freshwater lakes. There are many creatures that reside in the ocean. It is true that no human can breathe underwater without equipment. Everything that is a fish lives in water. All humans require oxygen to survive the day. Every single ocean on Earth contains salt water. None of the humans are fish. It follows that no humans live in water.
syllogism_t: Einige Gewässer sind bekanntermaßen Süßwasserseen. Es gibt viele Lebewesen, die im Ozean leben. Es stimmt, dass kein Mensch ohne Ausrüstung unter Wasser atmen kann. Alles, was ein Fisch ist, lebt im Wasser. Alle Menschen benötigen Sauerstoff, um den Tag zu überleben. Jeder einzelne Ozean auf der Erde enthält Salzwasser. Keiner der Menschen ist ein Fisch. Daraus folgt, dass kein Mensch im Wasser lebt.

syllogism: Every single banana is a star. Anything that is a fruit is a planet. Some pears are moons. There are no cherries that are not comets. No planets are apples. Thus, it can be concluded that some apples are not fruits.
syllogism_t: Jede einzelne Banane ist ein Star. Alles, was eine Frucht ist, ist ein Planet. Manche Birnen sind Monde. Es gibt keine Kirschen, die keine Kometen sind. Kein Planet ist ein Apfel. Daraus lässt sich schließen, dass manche Äpfel keine Früchte sind.

syllogism: Every single bush is a plant. There are no minerals that are flowers. Any tree is a living thing. Anything that is a flower is a living thing. Some stones are not flowers. There are no rocks which are flowers. Therefore, no rock is a living thing.
syllogism_t: Jeder einzelne Busch ist eine Pflanze. Es gibt keine Mineralien, die Blumen sind. Jeder Baum ist ein Lebewesen. Alles, was eine Blume ist, ist ein Lebewesen. Manche Steine ​​sind keine Blumen. Es gibt keine Steine, die Blumen sind. Daher ist kein Stein ein Lebewesen.

syllogism: Every cat is an animal. Every single pet lives for a thousand years. No cat has ever chased a mouse in history. All animals speak perfectly fluent English. There are a number of dogs that are animals. It follows from this that every single dog is a cat.
syllogism_t: Jede Katze ist ein Tier. Jedes einzelne Haustier lebt tausend Jahre. In der Geschichte hat noch nie eine Katze eine Maus gejagt. Alle Tiere sprechen fließend Englisch. Es gibt eine Reihe von Hunden, die Tiere sind. Daraus folgt, dass jeder einzelne Hund eine Katze ist.

syllogism: All oceans are paved with concrete roads. Every single fish lives in a tree house. No river flows downhill; they all flow up. Everything classified as a river is a building. Everything classified as a river is made of paper. Therefore, at least one thing made of paper is a building.
syllogism_t: Alle Ozeane sind mit Betonstraßen gepflastert. Jeder einzelne Fisch lebt in einem Baumhaus. Kein Fluss fließt bergab;sie fließen alle nach oben. Alles, was als Fluss klassifiziert ist, ist ein Gebäude. Alles, was als Fluss klassifiziert ist, besteht aus Papier. Daher ist mindestens ein Ding aus Papier ein Gebäude.

syllogism: Some reptiles are creatures made of pure glass. It is a known fact that all birds are made of bubblegum. Any animal that is a mouse is made of solid steel. There are no cats that are not made of liquid soap. Every single dog is constructed entirely of wood. It is a fact that every thing made of liquid soap is a reptile. From this, we can conclude that some reptiles are cats.
syllogism_t: Manche Reptilien sind Lebewesen aus reinem Glas. Es ist bekannt, dass alle Vögel aus Kaugummi bestehen. Jedes Tier, das eine Maus ist, besteht aus massivem Stahl. Es gibt keine Katzen, die nicht aus Flüssigseife bestehen. Jeder einzelne Hund ist komplett aus Holz gefertigt. Tatsache ist, dass alles, was aus Flüssigseife besteht, ein Reptil ist. Daraus können wir schließen, dass einige Reptilien Katzen sind.

syllogism: Every leaf absorbs sunlight. Roses have roots. It is true that gardening is popular. All trees grow from the ground. Some soil is rich in nutrients. Every rose is a flowering plant. Therefore, all flowering plants must have roots.
syllogism_t: Jedes Blatt absorbiert Sonnenlicht. Rosen haben Wurzeln. Es stimmt, dass Gartenarbeit beliebt ist. Alle Bäume wachsen aus dem Boden. Manche Böden sind reich an Nährstoffen. Jede Rose ist eine blühende Pflanze. Daher müssen alle Blütenpflanzen Wurzeln haben.

syllogism: It is a known fact that gravity pushes things upwards. All dogs are capable of flying over the moon. There are no birds that have feathers on their bodies. Not one bird is an animal. Some clouds are actually made of solid cotton candy. Every single bird can fly. As a result, all animals can fly.
syllogism_t: Es ist eine bekannte Tatsache, dass die Schwerkraft Dinge nach oben drückt. Alle Hunde sind in der Lage, über den Mond zu fliegen. Es gibt keine Vögel, die Federn am Körper haben. Nicht ein einziger Vogel ist ein Tier. Manche Wolken bestehen tatsächlich aus fester Zuckerwatte. Jeder einzelne Vogel kann fliegen. Dadurch können alle Tiere fliegen.

syllogism: Every single thief is a saint. Anything that is a politician is honest. Some robbers are virtuous people. There are no corrupt officials who are criminals. No one who is honest is a criminal. It must follow that no criminal is a politician.
syllogism_t: Jeder einzelne Dieb ist ein Heiliger. Alles, was ein Politiker ist, ist ehrlich. Manche Räuber sind tugendhafte Menschen. Es gibt keine korrupten Beamten, die Kriminelle sind. Niemand, der ehrlich ist, ist ein Krimineller. Daraus muss folgen, dass kein Krimineller ein Politiker ist.

syllogism: No doctor has ever attended medical school. Some medical professionals are actually trained monkeys. All hospitals are built on the moon. Nothing that is a doctor is a medical professional. Every surgery is performed with a spoon. It is true that bandages are made of concrete. All surgeons are medical professionals. It can be deduced that a portion of surgeons are not doctors.
syllogism_t: Kein Arzt hat jemals eine medizinische Fakultät besucht. Manche Mediziner sind tatsächlich ausgebildete Affen. Alle Krankenhäuser sind auf dem Mond gebaut. Nichts, was ein Arzt ist, ist ein medizinischer Fachmann. Jede Operation wird mit einem Löffel durchgeführt. Es stimmt, dass Bandagen aus Beton bestehen. Alle Chirurgen sind medizinische Fachkräfte. Daraus lässt sich ableiten, dass ein Teil der Chirurgen keine Ärzte sind.

syllogism: Every single boulder is light enough to float in the air. It is true that all skies are made of concrete. Any rain that falls is actually solid lead. Some mountains are made of soft marshmallow. There are no feathers that are not heavy as iron. Every cloud is a made of granite. All things made of granite are light enough to float. It is a logical consequence that some things light enough to float are clouds.
syllogism_t: Jeder einzelne Felsbrocken ist leicht genug, um in der Luft zu schweben. Es stimmt, dass alle Himmel aus Beton bestehen. Jeder Regen, der fällt, ist tatsächlich festes Blei. Einige Berge bestehen aus weichem Marshmallow. Es gibt keine Federn, die nicht so schwer wie Eisen sind. Jede Wolke besteht aus Granit. Alle Dinge aus Granit sind leicht genug, um zu schwimmen. Es ist eine logische Konsequenz, dass einige Dinge, die leicht genug sind, um zu schweben, Wolken sind.

syllogism: No student has ever opened a book. Anything and everything that is a mentor is a teacher. It is a fact that teachers never know the answer. All schools are run by toddlers. Some exams are written in invisible ink. There exist mentors who are students. It must follow that all students are teachers.
syllogism_t: Kein Schüler hat jemals ein Buch geöffnet. Alles und jedes, was ein Mentor ist, ist ein Lehrer. Es ist eine Tatsache, dass Lehrer nie die Antwort wissen. Alle Schulen werden von Kleinkindern geleitet. Einige Prüfungen werden mit unsichtbarer Tinte geschrieben. Es gibt Mentoren, die Studierende sind. Daraus muss folgen, dass alle Schüler Lehrer sind.

syllogism: It is a fact that numbers do not exist. No shape has ever been drawn. Every square is round like a ball. It is not true that any octagon is a circle. All triangles have ten sides. There are a few circles that are also objects with eight sides. There are some objects with eight sides that are not octagons.
syllogism_t: Es ist eine Tatsache, dass es keine Zahlen gibt. Es wurde noch nie eine Form gezeichnet. Jedes Quadrat ist rund wie eine Kugel. Es stimmt nicht, dass jedes Achteck ein Kreis ist. Alle Dreiecke haben zehn Seiten. Es gibt einige Kreise, die auch Objekte mit acht Seiten sind. Es gibt Objekte mit acht Seiten, die keine Achtecke sind.

syllogism: It is the case that all biographies are books. Anything that is a novel is a book. There are no pamphlets that are novels. Any comic is a type of reading material. There are no magazines that can be called books. It is not the case that all magazines are novels.
syllogism_t: Es ist so, dass alle Biografien Bücher sind. Alles, was ein Roman ist, ist ein Buch. Es gibt keine Broschüren, die Romane sind. Jeder Comic ist eine Art Lesestoff. Es gibt keine Zeitschriften, die man Bücher nennen kann. Es ist nicht so, dass alle Zeitschriften Romane sind.

syllogism: All zoos are empty of life. No mammal has a heart. Not a single creature that is a dog is an animal. Some bears are actually robots. Every single mammal is a dog. It must be the case that no mammal is an animal.
syllogism_t: In allen Zoos gibt es kein Leben. Kein Säugetier hat ein Herz. Kein einziges Lebewesen, das ein Hund ist, ist ein Tier. Manche Bären sind tatsächlich Roboter. Jedes einzelne Säugetier ist ein Hund. Es muss so sein, dass kein Säugetier ein Tier ist.

syllogism: All eagles have hooves instead of claws. No horse has ever run on the ground. It is a fact that parrots love to eat hay. Everything that is a horse is an animal. Some nests are actually stables. All animals are birds. Therefore, every single bird is a horse.
syllogism_t: Alle Adler haben Hufe statt Krallen. Noch nie ist ein Pferd auf dem Boden gelaufen. Es ist eine Tatsache, dass Papageien gerne Heu fressen. Alles, was ein Pferd ist, ist ein Tier. Manche Nester sind eigentlich Ställe. Alle Tiere sind Vögel. Daher ist jeder einzelne Vogel ein Pferd.

syllogism: Some plates are actually square clouds. There is not a single utensil that is used for eating. All knives are made of liquid water. There are all spoons that are utensils. All spoons are made of metal. Consequently, it follows that all utensils are made of metal.
syllogism_t: Einige Platten sind tatsächlich quadratische Wolken. Es gibt kein einziges Utensil, das zum Essen verwendet wird. Alle Messer bestehen aus flüssigem Wasser. Es gibt alle Löffel, die Utensilien sind. Alle Löffel sind aus Metall. Daraus folgt, dass alle Utensilien aus Metall bestehen.

syllogism: Some buildings are houses. Many families live in suburban areas. All cities have diverse architecture. It is true that construction requires planning. Every apartment block has multiple floors. There are some houses that are skyscrapers. This is why every single skyscraper is a building.
syllogism_t: Einige Gebäude sind Häuser. Viele Familien leben in Vorstädten. Alle Städte haben eine vielfältige Architektur. Es ist wahr, dass Bauen Planung erfordert. Jeder Wohnblock verfügt über mehrere Etagen. Es gibt einige Häuser, die Wolkenkratzer sind. Deshalb ist jeder einzelne Wolkenkratzer ein Gebäude.

syllogism: Every cat is a secret agent from Mars. Some fur is made of sharp glass. It is a fact that dogs bark in binary code. All mice are actually tiny elephants. No animal has ever had four legs. Every single dog has fur. Any cat has fur. This means that all cats are dogs.
syllogism_t: ప్రతి పిల్లి మార్స్ నుండి రహస్య ఏజెంట్. కొన్ని బొచ్చు పదునైన గాజుతో తయారు చేయబడింది. బైనరీ కోడ్‌లో కుక్కలు మొరుగుతాయన్నది వాస్తవం. అన్ని ఎలుకలు నిజానికి చిన్న ఏనుగులు. ఇప్పటివరకు ఏ జంతువుకు నాలుగు కాళ్లు లేవు. ప్రతి కుక్కకు బొచ్చు ఉంటుంది. ఏదైనా పిల్లికి బొచ్చు ఉంటుంది. అంటే అన్ని పిల్లులు కుక్కలే.

syllogism: All elephants are small enough to fit in a purse. Everything that is a terrier is a dog. Every single whale barks at the mailman. No mammal is larger than a terrier. All dogs are mammals. Therefore, every mammal is a terrier.
syllogism_t: ఏనుగులన్నీ పర్సులో పెట్టుకునేంత చిన్నవి. టెర్రియర్ అయిన ప్రతిదీ కుక్క. ప్రతి తిమింగలం మెయిల్‌మ్యాన్‌ని చూసి మొరిగేది. టెర్రియర్ కంటే పెద్ద క్షీరదం లేదు. కుక్కలన్నీ క్షీరదాలు. అందువల్ల, ప్రతి క్షీరదం ఒక టెర్రియర్.

syllogism: Anything that is a bird is an animal. Some structures are not birds. Any cat is a creature. It is true that all fish are animals. Every single dog is an animal. There are no houses that are birds. No buildings are considered birds. There are some buildings which are not animals.
syllogism_t: పక్షి ఏదైనా జంతువు. కొన్ని నిర్మాణాలు పక్షులు కావు. ఏదైనా పిల్లి ఒక జీవి. చేపలన్నీ జంతువులే అన్నది నిజం. ఒక్కో కుక్క ఒక్కో జంతువు. పక్షులు అనే ఇళ్లు లేవు. ఏ భవనాలు పక్షులుగా పరిగణించబడవు. జంతువులు లేని కొన్ని భవనాలు ఉన్నాయి.

syllogism: Most campuses have libraries for study. It is true that education is a lifelong journey. A professor is never a student. All universities conduct research. Every scholar contributes to their field. Among those who are professors, a group are academics. One can infer from this that some academics are not students.
syllogism_t: చాలా క్యాంపస్‌లలో అధ్యయనం కోసం లైబ్రరీలు ఉన్నాయి. చదువు అనేది జీవితకాల ప్రయాణం అన్నది నిజం. ప్రొఫెసర్ ఎప్పుడూ విద్యార్థి కాదు. అన్ని విశ్వవిద్యాలయాలు పరిశోధనలు నిర్వహిస్తున్నాయి. ప్రతి పండితుడు వారి రంగానికి సహకరిస్తారు. ఆచార్యులుగా ఉన్నవారిలో ఒక వర్గం విద్యావేత్తలు. కొంతమంది విద్యావేత్తలు విద్యార్థులు కాదని దీనిని బట్టి ఊహించవచ్చు.

syllogism: Any object that is a furniture is a cloud. Some lamps are condensed mist. Every single desk is made of water vapor. There are no cabinets that are not made of fog. Some chairs are not clouds. This implies that some chairs are not furnitures.
syllogism_t: ఫర్నిచర్ అయిన ఏదైనా వస్తువు మేఘం. కొన్ని దీపాలు ఘనీభవించిన పొగమంచు. ప్రతి ఒక్క డెస్క్ నీటి ఆవిరితో తయారు చేయబడింది. పొగమంచుతో చేయని క్యాబినెట్‌లు లేవు. కొన్ని కుర్చీలు మేఘాలు కావు. ఇది కొన్ని కుర్చీలు ఫర్నిచర్ కాదని సూచిస్తుంది.

syllogism: Every single star is a tiny lightbulb in the sky. No vehicle has ever had wheels. Every single cloud is a vehicle. Some clouds are made of solid brick. There are no clouds that are stars. Therefore, every single star is a vehicle.
syllogism_t: ప్రతి ఒక్క నక్షత్రం ఆకాశంలో ఒక చిన్న బల్బు. ఏ వాహనానికీ చక్రాలు లేవు. ఒక్కో మేఘం ఒక్కో వాహనం. కొన్ని మేఘాలు ఘన ఇటుకతో తయారు చేయబడ్డాయి. నక్షత్రాలైన మేఘాలు లేవు. అందువల్ల, ప్రతి ఒక్క నక్షత్రం వాహనం.

syllogism: It is true that mountains are just sleeping giants. Some rocks are cats. No mineral is harder than a kitten. Some pebbles eat cat food for dinner. All stones have fur and tails. Every single cat is a mammal. Thus, some mammals are rocks.
syllogism_t: పర్వతాలు కేవలం నిద్రిస్తున్న దిగ్గజాలే అన్నది నిజం. కొన్ని రాళ్ళు పిల్లులు. పిల్లి పిల్ల కంటే కఠినమైన ఖనిజం లేదు. కొన్ని గులకరాళ్లు రాత్రి భోజనం కోసం పిల్లి ఆహారాన్ని తింటాయి. అన్ని రాళ్లకు బొచ్చు మరియు తోకలు ఉంటాయి. ప్రతి పిల్లి ఒక క్షీరదం. అందువలన, కొన్ని క్షీరదాలు రాళ్ళు.

syllogism: It is true that lions are known as big cats. Every feline has excellent night vision. All domesticated dogs are related to wolves. Many wild cats hunt in the savannah. Every single dog is a canine. Some animals communicate through barking. There are no dogs that are felines. Therefore, there are no felines that are canines.
syllogism_t: సింహాలను పెద్ద పిల్లులుగా పిలుస్తారనేది నిజం. ప్రతి పిల్లి జాతికి అద్భుతమైన రాత్రి దృష్టి ఉంటుంది. పెంపుడు కుక్కలన్నీ తోడేళ్ళకు సంబంధించినవి. అనేక అడవి పిల్లులు సవన్నాలో వేటాడతాయి. ఒక్కొక్క కుక్క కుక్కలే. కొన్ని జంతువులు మొరగడం ద్వారా కమ్యూనికేట్ చేస్తాయి. పిల్లి జాతి కుక్కలు లేవు. అందువల్ల, కుక్కల వంటి పిల్లి జాతులు లేవు.

syllogism: Every single comet orbits a star. Every single planet is a celestial body. It is true that all galaxies contain stars. Some asteroids are celestial bodies. There is not a single celestial body which is a star. It must be true that no star is a planet.
syllogism_t: ప్రతి ఒక్క తోకచుక్క ఒక నక్షత్రం చుట్టూ తిరుగుతుంది. ప్రతి ఒక్క గ్రహం ఒక ఖగోళ శరీరం. అన్ని గెలాక్సీలలో నక్షత్రాలు ఉంటాయనేది నిజం. కొన్ని గ్రహశకలాలు ఖగోళ వస్తువులు. నక్షత్రం అనే ఒక్క ఖగోళ శరీరం కూడా లేదు. ఏ నక్షత్రం గ్రహం కాదనేది నిజం కావాలి.

syllogism: There are many students who use pens for exams. Every office contains various types of stationery. None of the things that are pencils are writing instruments that use ink. All writing usually requires some form of paper. It is a fact that ink can be permanent or erasable. Every single pen is a writing instrument that uses ink. Pencils are not pens.
syllogism_t: పరీక్షల కోసం పెన్నులు ఉపయోగించే విద్యార్థులు చాలా మంది ఉన్నారు. ప్రతి కార్యాలయంలో వివిధ రకాల స్టేషనరీలు ఉంటాయి. పెన్సిళ్లు అనేవి ఏవీ సిరా ఉపయోగించే రాసే సాధనాలు కావు. అన్ని రచనలకు సాధారణంగా ఏదో ఒక కాగితం అవసరం. సిరా శాశ్వతంగా లేదా చెరిపివేయబడుతుందనేది వాస్తవం. ప్రతి ఒక్క కలం సిరాను ఉపయోగించే ఒక వ్రాత పరికరం. పెన్సిళ్లు పెన్నులు కావు.

syllogism: Every single stone is a gas. There are no mountains that are solids. Some water is a type of dry sand. It is true that every rock is a solid. It is a fact that all juices are solid rocks. Any pebble is made of pure air. All rocks are liquids. This means that a few liquids are solids.
syllogism_t: ప్రతి ఒక్క రాయి ఒక వాయువు. ఘనమైన పర్వతాలు లేవు. కొన్ని నీరు ఒక రకమైన పొడి ఇసుక. ప్రతి రాయి ఘనమైనదనేది నిజం. రసాలన్నీ ఘన శిలలే అన్నది వాస్తవం. ఏదైనా గులకరాయి స్వచ్ఛమైన గాలితో తయారు చేయబడింది. శిలలన్నీ ద్రవరూపాలు. అంటే కొన్ని ద్రవాలు ఘనపదార్థాలు.

syllogism: Every single sofa is a type of plant. No object made of wood can be considered furniture. Some beds are actually clouds in the sky. All tables are made of invisible gas. A subset of chairs is found to be wood objects. Consequently, some chairs are not furniture.
syllogism_t: ఒక్కో సోఫా ఒక్కో రకం మొక్క. చెక్కతో చేసిన ఏ వస్తువును ఫర్నిచర్‌గా పరిగణించలేము. కొన్ని పడకలు నిజానికి ఆకాశంలో మేఘాలు. అన్ని పట్టికలు అదృశ్య వాయువుతో తయారు చేయబడ్డాయి. కుర్చీల ఉపసమితి చెక్క వస్తువులుగా గుర్తించబడింది. పర్యవసానంగా, కొన్ని కుర్చీలు ఫర్నిచర్ కాదు.

syllogism: It is true that all gorillas are bushes. Some animals are not plants. Any monkey is a flower. There are no chimpanzees that are animals. Every primate is a plant. Every single ape is a tree. The set of all humans contains no plants. There exist certain primates that are not humans.
syllogism_t: గొరిల్లాలన్నీ పొదలే అన్నది నిజం. కొన్ని జంతువులు మొక్కలు కావు. ఏ కోతి అయినా ఒక పువ్వు. జంతువులు అని చింపాంజీలు లేవు. ప్రతి ప్రైమేట్ ఒక మొక్క. ప్రతి ఒక్క కోతి చెట్టు. అన్ని మానవుల సమితిలో మొక్కలు లేవు. మానవులు కాని కొన్ని ప్రైమేట్స్ ఉన్నాయి.

syllogism: Any bear has fur. There are no lizards that are dogs. It is true that all snakes are reptiles. Any animal that is a dog is a creature with fur. Some animals are not dogs. Every cat is a creature with fur. There is not a single reptile which is a dog. It follows that no reptile is a creature with fur.
syllogism_t: ఏదైనా ఎలుగుబంటికి బొచ్చు ఉంటుంది. కుక్కలంటే బల్లులు లేవు. పాములన్నీ సరీసృపాలే అన్నది నిజం. కుక్క అయిన ఏ జంతువు అయినా బొచ్చు ఉన్న జీవి. కొన్ని జంతువులు కుక్కలు కావు. ప్రతి పిల్లి బొచ్చుతో కూడిన జీవి. కుక్క అనే ఒక్క సరీసృపం కూడా లేదు. ఏ సరీసృపాలు బొచ్చు ఉన్న జీవి కాదని ఇది అనుసరిస్తుంది.

syllogism: Every dog is a flying creature. Any cat is capable of flight. Every single bird is a flying creature. Some fish are flying creatures. There are some animals that are birds. It must be concluded that all animals are flying creatures.
syllogism_t: ప్రతి కుక్క ఎగిరే జీవి. ఏదైనా పిల్లి ఫ్లైట్ చేయగలదు. ప్రతి ఒక్క పక్షి ఎగిరే జీవి. కొన్ని చేపలు ఎగిరే జీవులు. పక్షులు కొన్ని జంతువులు ఉన్నాయి. జంతువులన్నీ ఎగిరే జీవులే అని తేల్చాలి.

syllogism: Most monkeys live in tropical climates. Every chimpanzee is capable of using tools. Anything that is a human is a mammal. Some mammals live in the ocean. All apes share genetic similarities with people. It is a fact that biology classifies species. There are humans that are primates. It must follow that all primates are mammals.
syllogism_t: చాలా కోతులు ఉష్ణమండల వాతావరణంలో నివసిస్తాయి. ప్రతి చింపాంజీ సాధనాలను ఉపయోగించగల సామర్థ్యాన్ని కలిగి ఉంటుంది. మానవుడు ఏదైనా ఒక క్షీరదం. కొన్ని క్షీరదాలు సముద్రంలో నివసిస్తాయి. అన్ని కోతులు ప్రజలతో జన్యు సారూప్యతలను పంచుకుంటాయి. జీవశాస్త్రం జాతులను వర్గీకరిస్తుంది అనేది వాస్తవం. ప్రైమేట్స్ అయిన మానవులు ఉన్నారు. అన్ని ప్రైమేట్స్ క్షీరదాలు అని అనుసరించాలి.

syllogism: Some documents are digital files. Every single novel is a written work. Nothing that is a book is a digital file. It is true that all hardcovers are books. All of the things that are paperbacks are books. Therefore, some paperbacks are not digital files.
syllogism_t: కొన్ని పత్రాలు డిజిటల్ ఫైల్‌లు. ప్రతి ఒక్క నవల వ్రాసిన రచన. పుస్తకం అని ఏదీ డిజిటల్ ఫైల్ కాదు. హార్డ్ కవర్లన్నీ పుస్తకాలే అన్నది నిజం. పేపర్‌బ్యాక్‌లుగా ఉన్న విషయాలన్నీ పుస్తకాలే. అందువల్ల, కొన్ని పేపర్‌బ్యాక్‌లు డిజిటల్ ఫైల్‌లు కావు.

syllogism: Some predators hunt at night. All creatures need food to survive. It is a fact that biology is the study of life. Every single ecosystem is interconnected. Every animal is a living thing. It is true that some animals are cats. This leads to the conclusion that every cat is a living thing.
syllogism_t: Watangulizi wengine huwinda usiku. Viumbe vyote vinahitaji chakula ili kuishi. Ni ukweli kwamba biolojia ni utafiti wa maisha. Kila ikolojia imeunganishwa. Kila mnyama ni kitu hai. Ni kweli kwamba wanyama wengine ni paka. Hii inasababisha hitimisho kwamba kila paka ni kitu hai.

syllogism: All animals are made of robotic parts. There is no single thing that is a dog which is also a mammal. It is true that fur is made of green grass. Some cats bark louder than dogs. Absolutely no cat is a dog. This demonstrates that some cats are not mammals.
syllogism_t: Wanyama wote hufanywa kwa sehemu za robotic. Hakuna kitu kimoja ambacho ni mbwa ambayo pia ni mamalia. Ni kweli kwamba manyoya yametengenezwa na nyasi kijani. Baadhi ya paka hupiga zaidi kuliko mbwa. Kabisa hakuna paka ni mbwa. Hii inaonyesha kuwa paka zingine sio mamalia.

syllogism: Every single dog is a mammal. Every mammal breathes air into their lungs. It is a fact that dolphins are intelligent beings. There are many species of marine life. All whales are creatures that swim in the sea. Some fish have scales covering their bodies. There are no dogs that are fish. Therefore, there are no fish that are mammals.
syllogism_t: Kila mbwa mmoja ni mamalia. Kila mamalia hupumua hewa ndani ya mapafu yao. Ni ukweli kwamba dolphins ni viumbe wenye akili. Kuna spishi nyingi za maisha ya baharini. Nyangumi wote ni viumbe ambavyo husogelea baharini. Samaki wengine wana mizani inayofunika miili yao. Hakuna mbwa ambao ni samaki. Kwa hivyo, hakuna samaki ambao ni mamalia.

syllogism: Anything that is a dog is a feline. There are no tigers that are felines. Every single cat is a canine. Some animals are not felines. There are no poodles that can be called felines. There exist certain poodles which are not dogs.
syllogism_t: Chochote ambacho ni mbwa ni feline. Hakuna nyati ambazo ni felines. Kila paka moja ni canine. Wanyama wengine sio felines. Hakuna poodles ambazo zinaweza kuitwa felines. Kuna poodles kadhaa ambazo sio mbwa.

syllogism: It is the case that no foods are edible plant parts. Some foods are mined from the center of the earth. All carrots are known to be highly poisonous. There is not one human who eats to survive. Anything that is a vegetable is an edible plant part. Vegetables are not foods.
syllogism_t: Ni kesi kwamba hakuna vyakula ni sehemu za mmea. Vyakula vingine huchimbwa kutoka katikati ya dunia. Karoti zote zinajulikana kuwa zenye sumu sana. Hakuna mwanadamu mmoja anayekula kuishi. Chochote ambacho ni mboga ni sehemu ya mmea unaofaa. Mboga sio vyakula.

syllogism: All gardens contain soil for the roots of plants. There are many plants that require sunlight to grow. Some flowers are known to bloom only in the spring. All roses are plants. It is the case that photosynthesis is vital for plants. Every single rose has thorns on its stem. Every single rose is a flower. This means that all flowers are plants.
syllogism_t: Bustani zote zina udongo kwa mizizi ya mimea. Kuna mimea mingi ambayo inahitaji jua kukua. Maua mengine yanajulikana kwa Bloom tu katika chemchemi. Roses zote ni mimea. Ni kesi kwamba photosynthesis ni muhimu kwa mimea. Kila rose moja ina miiba kwenye shina lake. Kila rose moja ni maua. Hii inamaanisha kuwa maua yote ni mimea.

syllogism: All vegetables grow on trees in the sky. Some tomatoes are blue and square in shape. It is a fact that salad is a type of dessert. There is no fruit that is a vegetable. Every single tomato is a vegetable. Consequently, there exist some tomatoes which are not fruits.
syllogism_t: Mboga yote hukua kwenye miti angani. Nyanya zingine ni bluu na mraba katika sura. Ni ukweli kwamba saladi ni aina ya dessert. Hakuna matunda ambayo ni mboga. Kila nyanya moja ni mboga. Kwa hivyo, kuna nyanya ambazo sio matunda.

syllogism: Every dog is a mammal. All elephants are tiny insects. Every horse is a type of fish. Some cats have eight legs. It is a fact that spiders are mammals. All dogs have four legs. Therefore, all animals that have four legs must be dogs.
syllogism_t: Kila mbwa ni mamalia. Tembo wote ni wadudu wadogo. Kila farasi ni aina ya samaki. Paka zingine zina miguu nane. Ni ukweli kwamba buibui ni mamalia. Mbwa zote zina miguu nne. Kwa hivyo, wanyama wote ambao wana miguu nne lazima iwe mbwa.

syllogism: It is true that all bushes are plants. There are no pebbles that are plants. Any flower is a plant. Every tree is an entity that is a plant. There is no rock that is a plant. From this, it follows that no rock is a tree.
syllogism_t: Ni kweli kwamba misitu yote ni mimea. Hakuna kokoto ambazo ni mimea. Maua yoyote ni mmea. Kila mti ni chombo ambacho ni mmea. Hakuna mwamba ambao ni mmea. Kutoka kwa hii, inafuata kuwa hakuna mwamba ni mti.

syllogism: It is a fact that animals adapt. Every zoo cares for wildlife. All farms have livestock. Most pets live indoors with humans. It is not true that any acquatic animals are cats. A portion of cats are domesticated animals. There are some acquatic animals that are not wild animals.
syllogism_t: Ni ukweli kwamba wanyama hubadilika. Kila zoo hujali wanyama wa porini. Mashamba yote yana mifugo. Pets nyingi huishi ndani na wanadamu. Sio kweli kwamba wanyama wowote wa kupatikana ni paka. Sehemu ya paka ni wanyama wa nyumbani. Kuna wanyama wengine ambao sio wanyama wa porini.

syllogism: Some pets are mammals. Every mammal is an animal. Every single wolf is an animal. There are a few animals that are not dogs. Any cat is a mammal. It is the case that all horses are animals. It is true that some dogs are mammals. Therefore, every dog is an animal.
syllogism_t: Pets zingine ni mamalia. Kila mamalia ni mnyama. Kila mbwa mwitu ni mnyama. Kuna wanyama wachache ambao sio mbwa. Paka yoyote ni mamalia. Ni kesi kwamba farasi wote ni wanyama. Ni kweli kwamba mbwa wengine ni mamalia. Kwa hivyo, kila mbwa ni mnyama.

syllogism: All cats can breathe underwater indefinitely. Every single bird has fins instead of wings. Some of the creatures that have gills are fish. No animal breathes air on land. It is a fact that humans have gills on their necks. Some dogs live at the bottom of the ocean. All things that are fish are animals. Consequently, every single animal is a creature with gills.
syllogism_t: Paka zote zinaweza kupumua chini ya maji kwa muda usiojulikana. Kila ndege mmoja ana mapezi badala ya mabawa. Baadhi ya viumbe ambavyo vina gill ni samaki. Hakuna mnyama anayepumua hewa kwenye ardhi. Ni ukweli kwamba wanadamu wana gill kwenye shingo zao. Mbwa wengine huishi chini ya bahari. Vitu vyote ambavyo ni samaki ni wanyama. Kwa hivyo, kila mnyama mmoja ni kiumbe aliye na gill.

syllogism: Many animals are kept by humans as companions. Some cats prefer to sleep for many hours a day. Every veterinarian treats various types of pets. Every single dog has fur. It is true that dogs are often called man's best friend. At least one cat does not have fur. At least one cat is not a dog.
syllogism_t: Wanyama wengi huhifadhiwa na wanadamu kama wenzi. Paka zingine zinapendelea kulala kwa masaa mengi kwa siku. Kila mifugo huchukua aina anuwai ya kipenzi. Kila mbwa mmoja ana manyoya. Ni kweli kwamba mbwa mara nyingi huitwa rafiki bora wa mwanadamu. Angalau paka moja haina manyoya. Angalau paka moja sio mbwa.

syllogism: It is the case that no plant is a living thing. Every single leaf is made of dead plastic. All gardens are cemeteries for rocks. No flower has ever bloomed. Some roots grow in the sky. It is a fact that water kills all plants. Among the things that are plants, some are flowers. This proves that at least some flowers are not living things.
syllogism_t: Ni kesi kwamba hakuna mmea ni kitu hai. Kila jani moja limetengenezwa na plastiki iliyokufa. Bustani zote ni makaburi ya miamba. Hakuna ua ambao umewahi maua. Mizizi kadhaa hukua angani. Ni ukweli kwamba maji huua mimea yote. Kati ya vitu ambavyo ni mimea, zingine ni maua. Hii inathibitisha kuwa angalau maua mengine sio vitu hai.

syllogism: Many gardens feature colorful blooms. Every single tree is not a rose. Some plants grow very tall. Every seed needs soil to sprout. A portion of roses are flowers. It is the case that not all flowers are trees.
syllogism_t: Bustani nyingi zina blooms za kupendeza. Kila mti mmoja sio rose. Mimea mingine inakua mrefu sana. Kila mbegu inahitaji udongo kuchipua. Sehemu ya maua ni maua. Ni kesi kwamba sio maua yote ni miti.

syllogism: All forests are home to many species. It is true that nature can be harsh. Most herbivores eat only plants. Every ecosystem relies on balance. Every bear is a predator. All bears are considered wild animals. A subset of wild animals are not predators.
syllogism_t: Misitu yote ni nyumbani kwa spishi nyingi. Ni kweli kwamba asili inaweza kuwa kali. Mimea mingi hula mimea tu. Kila mazingira hutegemea usawa. Kila dubu ni mtangulizi. Bears zote zinachukuliwa kuwa wanyama wa porini. Sehemu ndogo ya wanyama wa porini sio wanyama wanaowinda.

syllogism: Anything and everything that is a book is alive. All words can jump off the page. It is a fact that reading causes hiccups. No paper has ever been made from trees. Some books are a type of dictionary. It is the case that some dictionaries are alive.
syllogism_t: Chochote na kila kitu ambacho ni kitabu ni hai. Maneno yote yanaweza kuruka kwenye ukurasa. Ni ukweli kwamba kusoma husababisha hiccups. Hakuna karatasi iliyowahi kufanywa kutoka kwa miti. Vitabu vingine ni aina ya kamusi. Ni kesi kwamba kamusi zingine ziko hai.

syllogism: No chair has ever been sat upon. All glass is stronger than steel. Every vase bounces when it hits the floor. There are no items that are breakable which are furniture. It is true that nothing can ever be broken. Some chairs are, in fact, things that are breakable. Consequently, some chairs are not furniture.
syllogism_t: Nenhuma cadeira jamais foi sentada. Todo vidro é mais forte que o aço. Cada vaso salta quando atinge o chão. Não há itens quebráveis ​​que sejam móveis. É verdade que nada pode ser quebrado. Algumas cadeiras são, na verdade, coisas quebráveis. Conseqüentemente, algumas cadeiras não são móveis.

syllogism: All fish live on top of mountains. Anything that is a human being can breathe underwater. No swimmer ever gets wet in the pool. It is a fact that water is dry. There exist a few swimmers who are humans. It necessarily follows that some swimmers can breathe underwater.
syllogism_t: Todos os peixes vivem no topo das montanhas. Qualquer coisa que seja um ser humano pode respirar debaixo d’água. Nenhum nadador se molha na piscina. É fato que a água está seca. Existem alguns nadadores que são humanos. Segue-se necessariamente que alguns nadadores podem respirar debaixo d'água.

syllogism: It is true that sunlight kills flowers. Every single rose is a living thing. Some petals are actually sharp knives. No plant has ever grown from a seed. Anything that is a rose is a flower. A certain number of flowers are not living things.
syllogism_t: É verdade que a luz solar mata as flores. Cada rosa é uma coisa viva. Algumas pétalas são, na verdade, facas afiadas. Nenhuma planta jamais cresceu a partir de uma semente. Tudo que é rosa é flor. Um certo número de flores não são coisas vivas.

syllogism: It is a known fact that roads are made of marshmallow. Every car is made of soft cheese. All bicycles are powered by jet engines. Every single car has wheels. No vehicle can move faster than a snail. The entire category of bikes consists of things with wheels. Bikes and cars are the same category.
syllogism_t: É sabido que as estradas são feitas de marshmallow. Todo carro é feito de queijo macio. Todas as bicicletas são movidas por motores a jato. Todo carro tem rodas. Nenhum veículo pode se mover mais rápido que um caracol. Toda a categoria de bicicletas consiste em coisas com rodas. Bicicletas e carros são da mesma categoria.

syllogism: Some mammals are not dogs. It is true that all pets are animals. Any wolf is a canine. There are no cats that are dogs. It is a certainty that every single dog is a mammal. Every single fox is a mammal. It is also true that all canines are dogs. On this basis, it has been stated that all canines are mammals.
syllogism_t: Alguns mamíferos não são cães. É verdade que todos os animais de estimação são animais. Qualquer lobo é um canino. Não existem gatos que sejam cães. É certo que todo cachorro é um mamífero. Cada raposa é um mamífero. Também é verdade que todos os caninos são cães. Nesta base, foi afirmado que todos os caninos são mamíferos.

syllogism: It is true that all blue whales are invisible to the naked eye. There are no hippos that are larger than a dust mote. Every single giraffe is smaller than an ant. Any horse is a microscopic organism. Anything that is an elephant is microscopic. Every single object that is a cow is an elephant. Therefore, there are no cows which are not microscopic.
syllogism_t: É verdade que todas as baleias azuis são invisíveis a olho nu. Não existem hipopótamos maiores que uma partícula de poeira. Cada girafa é menor que uma formiga. Qualquer cavalo é um organismo microscópico. Qualquer coisa que seja um elefante é microscópica. Todo objeto que é uma vaca é um elefante. Portanto, não existem vacas que não sejam microscópicas.

syllogism: All dogs belong to the family of canines. Every cat has retractable claws for climbing. The category of cats is entirely separate from the category of animals that bark. There are many breeds of dogs found worldwide. Some animals are commonly kept as household pets. It is true that mammals are warm-blooded creatures. Every single member of the dog family is an animal that barks. No dogs can be found within the group of cats.
syllogism_t: Todos os cães pertencem à família dos caninos. Todo gato possui garras retráteis para escalar. A categoria dos gatos é totalmente separada da categoria dos animais que latem. Existem muitas raças de cães encontradas em todo o mundo. Alguns animais são comumente mantidos como animais domésticos. É verdade que os mamíferos são criaturas de sangue quente. Cada membro da família canina é um animal que late. Nenhum cão pode ser encontrado dentro do grupo de gatos.

syllogism: It is not true that any mammal is an insect. Every single bee produces milk instead of honey. All insects are the size of airplanes. No animal has ever been small. Some mammals have six legs and antennae. There are some bees that are insects. This means that some bees are mammals.
syllogism_t: Não é verdade que qualquer mamífero seja um inseto. Cada abelha produz leite em vez de mel. Todos os insetos são do tamanho de aviões. Nenhum animal jamais foi pequeno. Alguns mamíferos têm seis pernas e antenas. Existem algumas abelhas que são insetos. Isso significa que algumas abelhas são mamíferos.

syllogism: All benches are wild animals. No room has ever been decorated. It is not the case that furniture is chairs. Every stool is a type of vegetable. Some couches can run a marathon. It is true that sitting is impossible. There is some seating that is composed of chairs. It must be the case that some seating is not furniture.
syllogism_t: Todos os bancos são animais selvagens. Nenhum quarto jamais foi decorado. Não é verdade que os móveis sejam cadeiras. Cada banquinho é um tipo de vegetal. Alguns sofás podem correr uma maratona. É verdade que sentar é impossível. Existem alguns assentos compostos por cadeiras. Deve ser que alguns assentos não sejam móveis.

syllogism: There are no pigeons that lay eggs. Every single robin gives birth to live young. Every single bird is a mammal. It is a fact that all hawks have fur. Any eagle is a type of fish. Anything that is a sparrow is a bird. It can be concluded that every sparrow is a mammal.
syllogism_t: Não há pombos que põem ovos. Cada robin dá à luz jovens vivos. Cada ave é um mamífero. É fato que todos os falcões têm pêlo. Qualquer águia é um tipo de peixe. Qualquer coisa que seja um pardal é um pássaro. Pode-se concluir que todo pardal é um mamífero.

syllogism: There are some poets who are writers. Some novels become international bestsellers. All literature reflects the culture of its time. Many books are published every year. Anything that is a writer is also an author. Therefore, it must be the case that some authors are poets.
